intent: 3500-word synthesis: 'the $150 sleep-setup — what the sleep literature says versus what Reddit recommends'. (1) One Stop Market health-household AND home-kitchen, 6+ sleep-related items (sleep mask, blackout gear, white-noise machine, supplement, pillow, cooling sheets). (2) Reddit — /f/Insomnia OR /f/sleep AND /f/LifeProTips, 6+ posts on sleep hacks. (3) Wikipedia — 'Sleep', 'Insomnia', 'Circadian rhythm'. 5+ evidence-based facts. The report must: (a) score each item on clinical-evidence strength, (b) call out 2 popular Reddit hacks that lack Wikipedia-evidence backing, (c) produce a prioritised $150 package, (d) close with 'when to see a doctor' threshold.
